query:
SELECT 
  ad.data,
  ad.corretorId,
  u.name as corretorNome,
  ad.agendamentosConfirmados
FROM atividades_diarias ad
JOIN users u ON ad.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Leticia%'
  AND DATE(ad.data) = CURDATE();
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT 
  ad.data,
  ad.corretorId,
  u.name as corretorNome,
  ad.agendamentosConfirmados
FROM atividades_diarias ad
JOIN users u ON ad.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Leticia%'
  AND DATE(ad.data) = CURDATE();
